creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 175086
patch for translate-toolkit

The latest versions of textproc/pootle, 2.8.0+, need translate-toolkit 2.0.0.bX to run. Patch translate-toolkit accordingly, with a refreshed collection of manual pages.

While here, define the LICENSE because 'make check-sanity' insists on it.
